thesis.title: Project Telos Second-Wave Source-Checkout Tooling Claims

refutations.challenge: test the stated falsification: A current flagship MCP status or Telos room check reports a non-MATCH status, fewer than five ready flagships, or a tool count other than 70.
refutations.measurable: A current flagship MCP status or Telos room check reports a non-MATCH status, fewer than five ready flagships, or a tool count other than 70.

refutations.challenge: test the stated falsification: Learn status or doctor fails, the targeted test slice fails, or the temp study receipt does not report verified true.
refutations.measurable: Learn status or doctor fails, the targeted test slice fails, or the temp study receipt does not report verified true.

refutations.challenge: test the stated falsification: The isolated-target doctor fails, the C backend is not ready, hello.bld does not emit a passed receipt, or corpus verify does not report 8 C executions passed.
refutations.measurable: The isolated-target doctor fails, the C backend is not ready, hello.bld does not emit a passed receipt, or corpus verify does not report 8 C executions passed.

refutations.challenge: test the stated falsification: Emet selftest fails, the conformance suite reports fewer than 35 passing vectors, or the handoff claims the broken PATH wrapper is fixed.
refutations.measurable: Emet selftest fails, the conformance suite reports fewer than 35 passing vectors, or the handoff claims the broken PATH wrapper is fixed.

refutations.challenge: test the stated falsification: The second-wave docs are missing, omit the PATH/source-checkout boundary, or promote unverified PATH installs.
refutations.measurable: The second-wave docs are missing, omit the PATH/source-checkout boundary, or promote unverified PATH installs.
